increases, wealth starts dwindling. But if there is a promise of legacy & will in the natal chart,
then one gets wealth through them. If there is a promise of service in the natal chart, then one
acquires higher possession on death of higher authorities, benefits in earnings and salaries and
acquires wealth from partnership dealings.
Notes on Paraibhraman Padathi prepared by Prof. Anthony writer for the students of Jyotisha Bharati, Mumbai, India
36

NOTES ON PARIBHRAMAN PADATHI “THE ANNUAL HOROSCOPE” FOR STUDENTS
